vibe: Cinematic, futuristic glass desktop OS. Apple Vision Pro meets a hacker's terminal meets a Japanese arcade.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Modular, floating, and spatial. Generous padding inside glass containers.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento-style freeform floating grid. Elements can be snapped or floating. Use Framer Motion for drag and drop boundaries.

glassmorphism.usage: Floating windows, omnibar, sidebar panels, layout controls.

retro_terminal.base_classes: bg-black/90 border border-green-500/30 text-green-400 font-mono drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(34,197,94,0.3)]
retro_terminal.usage: Matrix background overlay, code snippets, specific hacker-themed mini-apps.

motion_and_interactions.general: Smooth spring physics (Framer Motion). No linear easing.
motion_and_interactions.windows: Scale up slightly (0.95 -> 1) and fade in on launch. Dragging should feel weighty with slight rotation (rotateZ 1deg on drag).
motion_and_interactions.omnibar: Expand width on focus, glow ring matches current mode (Web/Apps/AI).
motion_and_interactions.social_sidebar: Slide in from right (x: 100% -> 0%) with a backdrop blur overlay.

components_strategy.omnibar: Fixed top or center. 3-mode toggle with color shifting ring. Input purely unstyled HTML inside a glass pill.
components_strategy.floating_windows: Use Framer Motion `<motion.div drag dragMomentum={false} dragControls />`. Each window needs a macOS-style header (close/min/max) and glass body.
components_strategy.bookmark_manager: Grid of glass cards with site favicon and domain.
components_strategy.hero_clock: Fliqlo style: large black/glass panels split horizontally with 3D flip animation, OR pure typography using Cabinet Grotesk text-[15vw].
components_strategy.music_player: Mini draggable pill, spinning vinyl CD animation using `animate-spin`.
components_strategy.social_sidebar: Right-aligned fixed panel, tabbed navigation (Lucide icons), embedded iframes. `w-[380px]`.
components_strategy.backgrounds: Use `react-tsparticles` for snow/matrix/nodes, and CSS gradients for Aurora. Z-index -1.

image_urls.description: Abstract, curved black shapes with subtle shading
Cyberpunk neon city night for vibrant aesthetic preset
Colorful aurora borealis in night sky for natural aesthetic preset

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over glass panels has sufficient opacity/contrast. Add subtle text-shadow if needed.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, tabs, inputs, window headers) MUST have descriptive `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="omnibar-input"`, `data-testid="social-sidebar-toggle"`).
accessibility_and_testing.prefers_reduced_motion: Wrap complex canvas animations and window springs in standard CSS or disable on media query.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all `.js` files use React with Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion. Do not use `.tsx`.
Build the core layout as a full-screen app (`h-screen w-screen overflow-hidden`) to mimic an OS.
Implement the dynamic background layer strictly behind all UI (`z-[-1]`).
For the floating windows, maintain a global state (e.g., Zustand or React Context) of open apps, their z-index, and positions.
The Omnibar should have a keyboard shortcut (e.g., Cmd/Ctrl+K) to focus, and its border color must smoothly transition based on the active mode.
Do NOT use `Inter`, `Roboto`, or generic fonts. Use `Cabinet Grotesk` for headings and `Geist Mono` or `JetBrains Mono` for UI and body text.
Strictly follow the glassmorphism base classes (`bg-white/[0.03] backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/[0.08]`) to avoid muddy transparency.
Provide clear `data-testid` on all buttons, toggles, window controls, and input fields for reliable automated testing.
